$comment: Presentation document for the ingress-gateway chart. Three sections: views (form projections over values.schema.json, including the required order form), tabs (product list tables), actions (forms placed into the Actions menu). The chart's schema stays the single source of truth for validation; views only pick fields.

order.$comment: Initial order: naming tags + exactly one Gateway, no xroutes.

gateways.title: Gateway
gateways.$comment: name = identity: settable on create, locked (ui:readOnly) on edit/upgrade so the deploy identity can't change.

listener.$comment: Form for a single Gateway listener (all element fields).

route.$comment: Form for a single route: enabled always true (hidden), parentRefs[].gateway set automatically (hidden), hostnames hidden (the chart derives it from the listener via parentRefs[].sectionName).

resources.$comment: Form for the Gateway istio-proxy resources (gateways[0].resources), hidden in the order form.

tabs.title: Маршруты
tabs.$comment: enums: sectionName is chosen from this Gateway's listener names. ui:table Hostnames is computed by a join: a route's sectionName maps to the hostname of the matching listener (the same way the chart derives the hostname).
